prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Wartburg 1.6L 3-cylinder (engine code: 353W-1.6)** with forged internals (Mahle pistons, Carrillo connecting rods) and a custom billet crankshaft by **JE Pistons** to handle 300+ hp. Turbocharged with a **Garrett GT2860RS** on a custom manifold by **Turbosmart**, paired with a **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate** and **ID1000x injectors** for E85 compatibility.

Custom **Motec M150 ECU** standalone management with **AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensor** and **Haltech CAN bus dash** for real-time telemetry. Upgraded fuel system includes a **Walbro 450 LPH pump**, **Radium Engineering fuel surge tank**, and **AN-6 braided lines** with **Aeromotive FPR** for consistent pressure under lateral G-forces.

Full **KW Suspensions Clubsport 3-way adjustable coilovers** with **Eibach ERS springs** (800 lb/in front, 600 lb/in rear) and **Whiteline adjustable sway bars** (24mm front, 22mm rear). Braking system features **AP Racing CP6640 calipers** with **355mm two-piece rotors** (front) and **280mm rotors** (rear), paired with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Goodridge stainless steel brake lines**.
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** modified for the RS1000’s unique chassis, with **custom carbon fiber overfenders** by **Seibon** and **custom aluminum rear diffuser** by **Varis**. Front splitter features **Gurney flaps** and **canards** from **9 Lives Racing** for downforce optimization.

Custom **BBS RS-GT II 17x9 +25 (front) and 17x10 +30 (rear)** wheels with **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R 245/40/17 (front) and 275/35/17 (rear)** tires. Wheel spacers by **H&R TRAK+** (15mm front, 20mm rear) for aggressive flush fitment.

Full **PPG Deltron Urethane paint** in **Lime Gold Metallic (custom mix)** with **matte black RS1000 heritage stripes** and **carbon fiber side mirrors** by **AeroCatch**. Interior features **Recaro Pole Position seats** with **Schroth 6-point harnesses**, **MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel**, and **custom aluminum shift knob** by **TWM Performance**.
